text.title: Facebook Ads Playbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the ad account new (<30 days history)?

branch.question: Is verified domain + AEM configured AND page_quality ≥ standard?

conclusion.verdict: apply warmup ramp; launch with native placements only
block launch; complete AEM + page-quality work first

text.example: account new (5 days), AEM configured, page=standard → warmup ramp + native placements launch.
